title: callilepis glabra
intro: Callilepis glabra, also known as African pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to South Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have numerous health benefits, such as relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive problems. Callilepis glabra is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
